query:
INSERT INTO resources (category_id, name, description, url, phone, state, city, coverage_area, tags, verified_level) 
SELECT 1, 'VA Home Loan Program', 'VA-backed home loans for eligible veterans', 'https://www.va.gov/housing-assistance/', '1-888-273-8255', 'CA', 'Los Angeles', 'national', '["VA loans","home purchase"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 2, 'VA Medical Center Los Angeles', 'Full-service VA hospital providing comprehensive medical care', 'https://www.va.gov/los-angeles-health-care/', '1-888-273-8255', 'CA', 'Los Angeles', 'local', '["VA hospital","primary care"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 3, 'Vet Center San Diego', 'Counseling and support services for combat veterans', 'https://www.vetcenter.va.gov/', '1-619-294-6886', 'CA', 'San Diego', 'local', '["mental health","counseling"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 4, 'Military Child Care Assistance', 'Subsidized childcare for military families', 'https://www.militaryonesource.mil/', '1-800-342-9647', 'CA', 'Los Angeles', 'national', '["childcare","family support"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 5, 'GI Bill Education Benefits', 'Educational benefits for eligible veterans', 'https://www.va.gov/education/', '1-888-442-4551', 'CA', 'Statewide', 'national', '["education","GI Bill"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 6, 'Wounded Warrior Project Employment Services', 'Job training and placement for wounded veterans', 'https://www.woundedwarriorproject.org/', '1-888-882-2872', 'CA', 'Los Angeles', 'national', '["job training","employment"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 7, 'VA Benefits Counselor', 'Free counseling on VA benefits and entitlements', 'https://www.va.gov/disability/', '1-800-827-1000', 'CA', 'Statewide', 'national', '["benefits counseling","disability"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 8, 'VA Home Loan Program - Texas', 'VA-backed home loans for eligible veterans', 'https://www.va.gov/housing-assistance/', '1-888-273-8255', 'TX', 'Houston', 'national', '["VA loans","home purchase"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 9, 'Veterans Legal Services', 'Free legal assistance for veterans', 'https://www.va.gov/legal/', '1-888-273-8255', 'CA', 'Los Angeles', 'local', '["legal aid","veterans rights"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 10, 'Military Saves Program', 'Financial literacy and savings programs for military families', 'https://www.militarysaves.org/', '1-888-889-2872', 'CA', 'Statewide', 'national', '["financial literacy","savings"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 11, 'Feeding America Veterans Program', 'Food assistance for low-income veterans', 'https://www.feedingamerica.org/', '1-866-3-HUNGRY', 'CA', 'Los Angeles', 'national', '["food assistance","nutrition"]', 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 12, 'American Legion Post 123', 'Community support and veteran camaraderie', 'https://www.legion.org/', '1-317-630-1200', 'CA', 'Los Angeles', 'local', '["community","veteran support"]', 'community'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
